name: EGAIN Corp
summary: eGain Corp provides AI-powered knowledge hub SaaS solutions to enterprises, automating customer experience through three core products: eGain AI Agent, eGain AI Knowledge Hub, and eGain Conversation Hub. The company serves large enterprises and government organizations, helping them reduce contact center costs, improve agent productivity, ensure compliance, and deliver omnichannel customer service via chat, SMS, email, social media, phone, video, fax, and letter.

products.name: eGain AI Agent
products.description: Enterprise-grade agentic solution that assists human agents by listening to conversations and proactively guiding them through intent identification, issue resolution, and contact wrap-up.

products.name: eGain AI Knowledge Hub
products.description: Centralizes knowledge, policies, procedures, and best practices, delivering guided, personalized, and trusted answers to customers, agents, and field staff.

products.name: eGain Conversation Hub
products.description: Omnichannel desktop for digital-first interaction management supporting chat, SMS, email, social media, phone, video, fax, and letter.

products.name: Knowledge Management for Dummies
products.description: Thought leadership publication with generative AI updates, available digitally and in print, targeting knowledge management community.

products.name: Innovation in 30 Days Program
products.description: 30-day guided pilot in eGain Cloud at no cost, allowing businesses to experience the product with their own data and processes.
